summary: Completed testing of PDF upload and bill review functionality. Found critical backend issue where analytics runs successfully even with needs_manual_review bills, contradicting the expected behavior. Frontend authentication flow needs improvement for persistent sessions.

critical_bugs.issue: Analytics endpoint returns 200 success even when bills are in 'needs_manual_review' state, should return 400 with explicit error message
critical_bugs.impact: Users can run analytics without completing bill review, defeating the purpose of the manual review workflow
critical_bugs.details: The gather_site_readings function extracts readings from bills regardless of extraction_status, bypassing the intended validation logic

ui_bugs.issue: Session persistence issues - authentication doesn't persist across page navigations
ui_bugs.selector: Login form reappears after dev login
ui_bugs.details: Dev login works but session cookies may not be properly set or maintained

integration_issues.issue: Unable to fully test bill review dialog due to authentication persistence issues

passed_tests: Dev Bypass Auth Login - Successfully authenticates with test credentials
Upload Bill PDF (needs review) - PDF upload works and correctly sets needs_manual_review status
Bill Review Update - PATCH endpoint correctly updates bill fields and changes status to parsed
Analytics after bill review - Analytics works correctly after bill review completion
Dashboard Overview - Dashboard loads and shows correct bill counts
Health Check - Backend responsive and healthy
success_percentage: Backend: 85% (6/7 tests passed), Frontend: 30% (authentication issues prevented full testing)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix analytics endpoint to properly validate bill extraction_status before running analysis. The gather_site_readings function should not extract readings from bills with 'needs_manual_review' status. Also improve frontend session persistence for dev login.
